name: analyze_wallet
description: Perform full portfolio risk analysis for a crypto wallet. Scans multi-chain holdings (Ethereum, Base, Polygon, Arbitrum, Optimism), calculates risk scores, analyzes asset breakdown (stablecoins, blue chips, DeFi, memecoins, NFTs), and generates optimization recommendations. Use this for comprehensive portfolio analysis. For specific scenario testing, use stress_test instead.

name: check_payment
description: Verify that a payment transaction was successful and check if the user qualifies for free access (holds 1000+ $BANKR). Use this to validate payments before running analysis. Returns whether the payment is valid and the user's access status.

tx_hash.description: Transaction hash of the payment (ETH/USDC transfer)

name: execute_buyback
description: Execute automatic buyback of $BANKR token using collected fees via Uniswap. Swaps USDC/ETH fees to $BANKR to create buy pressure. Use this to convert collected fees into BANKR tokens (can be burned or distributed to stakers). This is the monetization mechanism that makes the service self-sustaining.

amount_usdc.description: Amount of USDC to swap for $BANKR

name: stress_test
description: Run portfolio stress tests with various market scenarios to evaluate risk exposure. Tests include market crash scenarios (-20%, -50%, -80% drops), liquidation risk analysis, and high-gas cost impact. Use this to understand how the portfolio performs under adverse conditions. For general analysis, use analyze_wallet instead.

scenario.description: Type of stress scenario: crash (market drop), liquidation (collateral ratio check), gas (high network fees)

drop.description: Percentage drop for crash scenario (20, 50, or 80)

name: optimize_portfolio
description: Generate portfolio optimization recommendations including rebalancing suggestions, hedging strategies, yield optimization opportunities, and tax-loss harvesting ideas. Analyzes current allocation and provides actionable advice to reduce risk and improve returns. Use this after running analyze_wallet to get specific actionable recommendations.

focus.description: Optimization focus: risk (reduce exposure), yield (maximize returns), balanced (mix both)
